title: Hugging Face MCP Server - MCP Servers
detailMarkdown:
# Hugging Face MCP Server - MCP Servers
Access Hugging Face Hub and Gradio AI applications
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Hugging Face
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `ai` `hugging-face` `machine-learning` `models` `datasets`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status hugging-face
```

## Config
```json
{
  "huggingface": {
    "url": "https://huggingface.co/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status hugging-face

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/hugging-face-mcp-server
